prompt: Prayer for blessing flamer promethium feed before battle
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Cognitus ignis sacra, let the promethium-spirit awaken.'
CONGREGATION: 'By fuel and flame, we invoke the Omnissiah.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'First, the pressure-regulators sing their calibrated song. Second, the feed-lines drink deep of sacred hydrocarbons. Third, the ignition-mechanism stands ready.'
CONGREGATION: 'Blessed be the burning, blessed be the flow, blessed be the flamer-spirit's wrath.'

prompt: Rite for lascannon capacitor charging during standard operations
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Behold the energy-vessels, empty and yearning.'
CONGREGATION: 'Fill them with the Omnissiah's breath.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'The power-conduits hum in anticipation. The capacitor-cells align their crystalline matrices. Current flows like sacred oil through blessed circuits.'
CONGREGATION: 'When full, let the beam-spirit strike true.'

prompt: Combat blessing for organ preservation unit activation
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'O preserving spirits of stasis and cold, cradle the sacred flesh.'
CONGREGATION: 'Guard it from decay, shield it from time's entropy.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'The cryo-pumps shall pulse. The temperature-regulators shall hold steady at prescribed degrees. No corruption shall take root in this holy vessel.'
CONGREGATION: 'Preserved be the flesh, eternal be the organ-spirit's vigil.'

prompt: Maintenance ritual for pressure gauge recalibration
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The gauge-spirit speaks in numbers; let us understand its truth.'
CONGREGATION: 'Calibrate and verify, that deception be cast out.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Set the reference-weight at standard. Mark the zero-point in the sacred chart. Each increment shall be measured and blessed, that pressure and reality accord.'
CONGREGATION: 'So measured, so ordained, so correct.'

prompt: First-use blessing for decontamination sequence activation
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Purification begins. The sprayers awaken. The scrubbers rise.'
CONGREGATION: 'Wash away the unclean, that the sacred may dwell.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Chemical-spirits flow in measured streams. Agitation-mechanisms churn the cleansing waters. Drains sing their evacuation-hymn. First activation blessed, first purge ordained.'
CONGREGATION: 'Cleansed be the chamber, holy be the sequence.'

prompt: Emergency quality control scanning during critical production failure
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The scanner-eye opens. Speak, machine-spirit, what flaw festers?'
CONGREGATION: 'Reveal the hidden corruption that we may excise it.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Laser-line traces the defect-shadow. Photoreceptors drink the reflected truth. The cogitator-mind compares to standard-templates. In haste we seek, yet precision we maintain.'
CONGREGATION: 'Show us the sickness, grant us swift remedy.'

prompt: Rite for conveyor belt system initialization during routine shift
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The belt-spirit stirs from rest. Motors hum their ancient song.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let it turn, let it carry, let it serve the Machine God's purpose.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Engage the drive-shafts gradually. Let tension mount upon the rubber-cord. Rollers spin in synchronized rhythm. Guard-rails stand sentinel.'
CONGREGATION: 'Blessed be the turning, eternal be the flow.'

prompt: Blessing before mag-lev train departure carrying combat supplies
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'The rails sing their magnetic chorus. The carriage-spirits prepare to fly.'
CONGREGATION: 'Bear our sacred cargo swiftly to the field of war.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Superconductor-coils energize in perfect harmony. Suspension-fields balance mass and motion. The track-spirit guides the levitation-dance. Speed and safety interlace in the Omnissiah's design.'
CONGREGATION: 'Fast be thy journey, safe be thy passage, blessed be thy arrival.'

prompt: First blessing for memory core defragmentation upon initial deployment
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'A virgin mind awaits its first ordering. Fragments settle into place.'
CONGREGATION: 'Make it whole, make it pure, that it serve the Omnissiah from inception.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'The defragmentation-algorithm moves through untouched sectors. Pathways organize themselves in pristine geometry. No corruption mars this first purification. Efficiency is born.'
CONGREGATION: 'Ordered be its first thought, blessed be its purpose, eternal be its service.'
